# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

# config/environments/development.rb
ActionMailer::Base.smtp_settings = {
  user_name: ENV['SENDGRID_USERNAME'],
  password: ENV['SENDGRID_PASSWORD'],
  api_key: ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY'],
  domain: 'localhost:3000',
  address: 'smtp.sendgrid.net',
  port: 587,
  authentication: :plain
}

# lib/mailer.rb
class Mailer < ActionMailer::Base
  default from: ENV['FROM_EMAIL']
  layout 'mailer'

  def deliver_later(message)
    ActionMailer::Base.deliver_now(message)
  end

  private

  def configure_sendgrid
    config.api_key = ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY']
  rescue StandardError => e
    puts "Error setting up SendGrid API Key: #{e.message}"
  end

  def setup_smtp
    ActionMailer::Base.smtp_settings[:user_name] = ENV['SENDGRID_USERNAME']
    ActionMailer::Base.smtp_settings[:password] = ENV['SENDGRID_PASSWORD']
    ActionMailer::Base.smtp_settings[:api_key] = ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY']
  rescue StandardError => e
    puts "Error setting up SendGrid SMTP: #{e.message}"
  end

  def check_environment
    return if Rails.env.production?
    setup_smtp
  end

  def deliver_email
    configure_sendgrid
    if !Rails.application.config.action_mailer.smtp_settings || !(ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY'] && ENV['SENDGRID_USERNAME'])
      ActionMailer::Base.raise_delivery_errors = true
      raise "You must define SENDGRID_API_KEY and SENDGRID_USERNAME in the environment"
    end

    yield(self)
  ensure
    configure_sendgrid
    Rails.application.config.action_mailer.smtp_settings[:user_name] = nil
    Rails.application.config.action_mailer.smtp_settings[:password] = nil
  end
end

# app/mailers/base_mailer.rb
class BaseMailer < Mailer
  def initialize(recipient, subject)
    @recipient = recipient
    @subject = subject
  end

  private

  def prepare_message
    message = ActionMailer::Base.new
    message.recipients.add(@recipient)
    message.subject = @subject
    message.from = ENV['FROM_EMAIL']
    yield(message)
    message
  rescue StandardError => e
    puts "Error preparing email: #{e.message}"
    raise
  end

  def send_email(message)
    ActionMailer::Base.deliver_now(message)
  rescue StandardError => e
    puts "Error sending email: #{e.message}"
    raise
  end

  def deliver
    prepare_message do |message|
      # Add attachments, images and other mailer functionality
    end
    send_email(prepare_message)
  end
end
